name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Win a trip to join me at the Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want you to witness history. |

Friend, You believed in our movement when no one else did. You are the reason we will Make America Great Again! Which is why I’d love you to be there when we make it official, and I’m humbly sworn in as your 45th president. Contribute $3 BEFORE January 13 at 11:59pm to be automatically entered for a chance to win a trip to Washington, D.C., to join me for our Inauguration. The entire world will be watching that day. But let me be clear: they will not be watching me. They will be watching us. They will be watching a new chapter in American history unfold. They will be watching a movement of free people reclaim their independence. They will be watching us unite as one people, saluting one American flag, ready to deliver real change for our country. This isn’t my inauguration. It’s ours. When I raise my right hand to take the Oath of Office, I will be doing it in honor of the forgotten men and women of our country, who banded together to usher in a historic victory last November. Friend: I’ll be doing it for you. I hope to see you there on this historic day. Enter now to win a trip to witness our historic Inauguration on January 20, 2017. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President-Elect of the United States ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between January 5, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on January 18, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for two (2) nights for the winner and one guest and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor (approximate retail value $3,000). In addition, although the Presidential Swearing-In Ceremony is not part of the official prize package, Trump Make America Great Again Committee will have access to tickets. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. This Sweepstakes is not affiliated with the 58th Presidential Inaugural Committee.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

name: Democrats.org
subject: Protect health care. (✎ sign your name)
body:

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c192/4067b0a/23586517c/7e79d298/1094901462/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c192/4067b0a/23586517c/7e79d299/1094901462/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c192/4067b0a/23586517c/7e79d2a6/1094901462/VEsHBw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c192/4067b0a/23586517c/7e79d2a7/1094901462/VEsHBg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: survey@maggiehassan.com
subject: Hi there, will you share your thoughts? >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3c/2a380d31/143fdb14/fec2a2/82931467/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3c/2a380d31/143fdb14/fec2a2/82931467/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello there,
Donald Trump has made it clear that he wants to defund Planned Parenthood and undo _Roe v. Wade_ , offer tax breaks to corporate special interests and Wall Street billionaires, and repeal the Affordable Care Act.
He has named Steve Bannon, the former head of _Breitbart News_ known for his anti-Semitic, bigoted, misogynistic, and homophobic agenda, as his chief strategist. And confirmation hearings for Trump's Cabinet are set to begin next week.
Trump will be sworn in as President in less than two weeks and we'd really like to get your thoughts before that happens, please. [**Will you take this short survey and share what you're thinking? It will only take a minute.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3c/2a380d31/143fdb14/fec2a3/82931467/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170117_17prioritiessurvey-nd?&source=e20170107_survey1-nd")
Thanks for speaking up,
Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3c/2a380d31/143fdb14/fec2ac/82931467/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxNzAxMDdfdHJ1bXAtc3VydmV5LW5kIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxNzAxMDdfc3VydmV5MV9uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/20170107_trump-survey-nd?refcode=e20170107_survey1_nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd3c/2a380d31/143fdb14/fec2ad/82931467/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

He has named Steve Bannon, the former head of Breitbart News known for his anti-Semitic, bigoted, misogynistic, and homophobic agenda, as his chief strategist. And confirmation hearings for Trump's Cabinet are set to begin next week. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: my pledge to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Yesterday -- in my first speech on the Senate floor -- I pledged to fight every day to defeat their reckless plan. | Friend,

I was honored to be sworn in earlier this week to represent the people of Maryland in the United States Senate -- a chamber that has prided itself during our history for being a place of open debate and deliberation on critical issues facing our nation.

Sadly, the Senate Republicans violated that tradition this week. In an unprecedented move, they started the session with a budget procedure that tramples on the rights of the minority in pursuit of their partisan obsession to dismantle the Affordable Care Act (ACA) -- with nothing to put in its place. That reckless act will generate chaos throughout our health care system.

Ordinarily, new senators are not expected to speak for several weeks. But these are not ordinary times and this is no time for business-as-usual. I could not remain silent in the face of this outrage. Yesterday -- in my first speech on the Senate floor -- I pledged to fight every day to defeat their reckless plan.

**[Please add your name to tell Republicans in Congress that you're standing with me against their efforts to dismantle the ACA.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b55/70cdc2ba/473ab322/3979d24/4089763831/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+add+your+name+to+tell+Republicans&utm_campaign=em010617&source=em010617")** [ADD YOUR NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b55/70cdc2ba/473ab322/3979d25/4089763831/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em010617&source=em010617") If Congressional Republicans get their way, the ensuing healthcare crisis will destroy access to affordable care for the 30 million Americans who receive healthcare through the ACA exchanges and expanded Medicaid. It will also have a harmful impact on millions more including the majority of Americans who get their health insurance through their employers, seniors on Medicare, and individuals who have benefited from the ACA patient protections against discrimination due to preexisting conditions -- including the 'preexisting condition' of being female. And the list goes on.

We cannot let this happen, friend. We MUST fight to protect the progress that we've made.

Please add your name and tell Senate Republicans that the American people will not let them get away with dismantling health care and then running off. Let them know they will not be able to hide and that we will hold them accountable. The voices of the American people need to be heard. We must stop them now!

**[http://action.vanhollen.org/Protect-The-ACA](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b55/70cdc2ba/473ab322/3979d22/4089763831/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-aca?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+httpactionvanhollenorgProtectTheACA&utm_campaign=em010617&source=em010617")**

Thank you for standing for what's right,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

[www.vanhollen.org/donate](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b55/70cdc2ba/473ab322/3979d23/4089763831/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vanhollen?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+wwwvanhollenorgdonate&utm_campaign=em010617&source=em010617")

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b55/70cdc2ba/473ab322/3979d20/4089763831/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=5+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em010617&source=em010617") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Democrats.org
subject: re: President Obama's final speech
body:
We'll send you a reminder before it starts! **Add your name if you plan on watching President Obama's farewell address on Tuesday, January 10th, and we'll send you a special reminder so you don't miss out.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1aa/4067b0a/23577f5fe/7e79d68c/3809394345/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1aa/4067b0a/23577f5fe/7e79d68d/3809394345/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc2_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1aa/4067b0a/23577f5fe/7e79d68b/3809394345/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170107_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170107_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Ready for the Women's March?
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d7c/3227631399/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all")
---

Peter,

We're just a few weeks out from the Women's March on Washington and sister marches in cities across the country.

Are you ready?

As you're getting your plans in order, make sure you send a strong message once you get there.

The EMILY's List Store has all your needs covered: rally signs to wave, knit hats to stay warm, and coffee tumblers for keeping caffeinated. I want to make sure you get your gear early enough to have it in time for the march.

**[Order your Women's March gear in the EMILY's List Store today.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d7e/3227631399/VEsE/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Order+your+Womens+March+gear+in+the+EMIL&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all")**
[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d78/3227631399/VEsF/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all")
We're proud to be standing alongside so many feminists to raise our voices and show that women will continue to be heard.

And with hundreds of thousands of women and men expected to turn out in marches across the country on January 21st, we will be a force that can't be ignored.

Make sure you're part of the EMILY's List crew on the ground, and that you get all your march gear in time.

**Shop our Women's March collection now:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Get-Your-Rally-Gear](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d79/3227631399/VEsC/ "http://store.emilyslist.org/collections/rally-merch?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgGetYourRallyGear&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all")**

Thank you,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d7b/3227631399/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d75/3227631399/VEsA/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=6+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d76/3227631399/VEsB/ "http://action.emilyslist.org/page/s/less-email-private-bc?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe [here](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c70ca/24c69fd9/fd762263/18ee9d70/3227631399/VEsO/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all&source=WQEFE105N_digital_email_20170107_JOCmarchNonopens_n-all"). Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A powerful rebuke to the corrupt establishment
body:
We need Vincent Fort's leadership in the Atlanta Mayor's office.
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One of the ways we effectively oppose Trump's right wing extremism is with strong and progressive leadership at the local and state level. One of those leaders is Georgia State Senator Vincent Fort who is running for Mayor of Atlanta, Georgia.
Vincent Fort has always been a powerful ally of our movement. As a state senator, he was arrested for protesting Wall Street greed with Occupy Atlanta, and again when protesting a lack of Medicaid expansion in the state of Georgia. He drafted and passed the strongest law against predatory home lending in the nation, and he has been a tireless advocate for reforming our broken criminal justice system. Senator Fort is a popular Atlanta politician, especially in low-income African-American neighborhoods and, with our help, he can become Atlanta's next Mayor.
When we started our political revolution, very few elected officials had the courage to stand with us. Georgia State Senator Vincent Fort was one of the first, and he paid a hefty price for it.
The establishment in Georgia did everything they could to exact their revenge on Senator Fort - they even recruited a primary opponent to run against him in the last election cycle as punishment. They failed to take him down then - and now that he's running to be the next Mayor of Atlanta, we expect the entrenched political establishment and their billionaire backers to do everything in their power to defeat him.
We need Vincent Fort's leadership in the Atlanta Mayor's office. Winning this campaign will send a strong message to the establishment that the struggle continues to create a government, at the local, state and federal level, that works for all of us, not just the one percent.
Georgia state senators are forbidden from raising money into their campaign accounts during legislative session starting January 9th. That means that we have to do as much for Senator Fort as we can before this fundraising deadline.
If enough of us are willing to come together right now, then we can elect one of our own as a powerful rebuke to the corrupt establishment. And Senator Fort will be able to focus on fighting for the people of Georgia without having to worry about his mayoral campaign next week.
[**Contribute $3 before January 9th as a way of letting Vincent Fort know that he has the support of our political revolution.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send")
We know how powerful this movement is when millions of people come together to support our political revolution. Vincent Fort joined together with us when we needed him the most. Now it's our turn to be there for him.
[**Help us send a powerful message to the entrenched political establishment by contributing $3 to Vincent Fort 's campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send")
Thank you for stepping up to support our friend Vincent Fort's mayoral campaign.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vincent-fort?refcode=em170107-full-send")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
